title: Day Counter+ v2 (Multiplayer & 24h Time Support)
description: A lightweight modification of the original Day Counter by justwilly, adding full multiplayer support. It displays the current day, player coordinates, and in-game time using a 24-hour format above the hotbar for better readability and usability.
body:
**Day Counter+ V2** is a modification of the original mod created by justwilly.
This version focuses on adding additional HUD information and improving multiplayer compatibility.

The mod displays several pieces of information above the hotbar in a simple overlay.

![Mod preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5178aa57f4c58397e7808c937aa9db7a568b49e7.png)

# 🛠️ Features
- Day counter displayed above the hotbar
- Player coordinates (X, Y, Z)
- In-game time in 24-hour format
- Works in multiplayer environments

# 📌 Notes

This mod is a lightweight HUD overlay and does not add gameplay mechanics.

# ⚠️ Credits
- Original mod by justwilly
- Modified version with additional HUD elements and multiplayer support
